description_long: This object is a compact stereo sound system consisting of two rectangular speaker units with rounded edges, finished in matte black. The front face of each speaker features a circular speaker grille, with the right unit displaying a central rotary knob and a small indicator light, suggesting volume control and power status. The left speaker has the text 'Mashiro.S' printed below the grille, adding a branded touch. Both units have a horizontal slot near the bottom, possibly for acoustic or design purposes. The sides and back of the speakers are smooth and unadorned, with no visible ports or connectors. The overall design is minimalist and modern, suitable for desktop or shelf placement in urban environments.
description: A pair of matte black, rectangular stereo speakers with rounded edges, front-facing grilles, a volume knob, and subtle branding. The design is minimalist and modern, with smooth sides and a clean appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both speaker grilles, the 'Mashiro.S' branding on the left unit, and a rotary knob with indicator light on the right unit.
description_view_1: Side view of the right speaker, highlighting its smooth, unadorned surface and the protruding rotary knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, featureless backs of both speakers with no visible ports or connectors.
description_view_3: Side view of the left speaker, showing a smooth, uninterrupted surface with no controls or branding visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The left speaker features the text 'Mashiro.S' in a stylized font on the lower front face.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Each speaker has a circular, slightly recessed grille with a smooth, solid appearance and no visible mesh or perforation pattern.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The right speaker has a single rotary knob and a small indicator light on the front face, with no other visible controls or labels.
